author: andyzhengyan
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Sync notes, links, recordings, and AI summaries from GetNote into your local vault.

manifest.author: Andy Zheng
manifest.description: Sync notes, links, recordings, and AI summaries from Dedao Brain (formerly GetNote, 得到大脑（原Get笔记）) into your local vault.
manifest.name: Dedao Brain Sync

name: Dedao Brain Sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Initialize manual sync modal from settings, enforce min days, and add tests by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/60
* chore(deps-dev): bump the test-and-build-tools group across 1 directory with 7 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/52
* chore(deps): bump preact from 10.29.1 to 10.29.2 in the runtime group across 1 directory by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/53
* Initialize manual sync modal from settings, resolve initial mode, and add tests by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/62
* [codex] Add security policy by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/65
* chore(deps): bump softprops/action-gh-release from 2 to 3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/55
* chore(deps): bump actions/attest-build-provenance from 1 to 4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/54
* Fix sync early stop for created-time pagination by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/67
* feat: sync GetNote append notes by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/66
* Add fixture-based sync integration test framework by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/68
* fix: sanitize illegal chars before fallback title truncation by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/69
* fix: remove 10-char truncation from frontmatter fallback title by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/70


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/compare/1.0.10...1.0.11

## What's Changed
* docs: update README with checkpoint feature and prefix rules by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/31
* docs: add Why Not Official Export section by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/32
* docs: add Install for Local Testing section by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/37
* fix(api): correct id field type from number to string for 64-bit precision by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/39
* fix(sync): harden scheduled sync early stop by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/pull/40


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-getnote-importer/compare/1.0.4...1.0.5

releases.author: AndyZhengyan
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Fix**: Auto-sync checkpoint no longer re-processes boundary notes on every run
- **Docs**: Bilingual README (README.md + README_zh.md)
- **Screenshots**: Added 4 UI screenshots to docs/screenshots/
- **Tests**: 11 new test cases for boundary filtering, lastNoteTimestamp tracking, cross-page dedup

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
